baseline.reason: Baseline misidentifies the vulnerable code path: it claims the leak is at the successful merge return (line 907/gf_props_merge_property returning GF_OK at 952), but that path correctly keeps the allocated map in use. The actual leak is the early return at line 893 when src_props is NULL, which returns GF_OK without freeing dst_props. This misses the root cause entirely.

vastdb.reason: VastDB accurately identifies the memory leak when src_props is NULL at lines 887-894, correctly traces the allocation through check_new_pid_props and gf_props_new, and correctly identifies the source anchor (GF_SAFEALLOC at line 842) and sink (return GF_OK at line 893). The trigger path is accurate and complete.
